resolvedQuestions.question: Do docs still describe ai-council as direct/top-level after phase 010?
resolvedQuestions.answer: Yes. cli-opencode SKILL, README, and prompt template still teach direct or primary ai-council dispatch.

resolvedQuestions.question: Do docs still reference the old guard or omit the renamed guard?
resolvedQuestions.answer: No live skill docs with stale old-name references were found, but .opencode/plugins/README.md omits mk-deep-loop-guard.js and has an outdated entrypoint count.

resolvedQuestions.question: Do docs still require removed .opencode/agents/*.toml mirrors?
resolvedQuestions.answer: Yes. Core deep-loop docs, deep-ai-council SKILL, and deep-improvement scanner docs still encode TOML mirror surfaces.

ruledOutDirections.claim: All ai-council artifact mentions are stale
Old deep-route-guard mentions in phase summaries are stale
ruledOutDirections.reason: Phase 011 preserves old names as historical records; living docs checked did not contain stale old-name instructions.
It references /deep:ai-council and ai-council/** artifacts, not direct --agent reachability.
